chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Revision No.S- 13 of 2025 DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE Hearing of case (Priority) 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of MA No.6198/2024 (S/A) 3. For hearing of main case. 24.07.2025 Applicant No.1 Sajjad Hussain present in person Private respondent Ghulam Abbas present in person Mr. Muhammad Raza Katohar, Deputy PG for State >>>>>..<<<<< Applicant No.1 Sajjad Hussain present in person for self and on behalf of rest of the applicants does not wish to press instant Criminal Revision Application. Accordingly, the same is dismissed as not pressed along with listed application. Judge ARBROHI/PS
